name: Wiz
description: Wiz is the owner of a famous Magic Item Shop in Axel that has many unsalable items with quirky defects. She used to be a renowned Arch Wizard, but has since retired. At night, she has a secret identity as a kind-hearted lich who helps lingering spirits pass on. She is also the only harmless Demon King's General and prefers to live as a human.
